title: Cost — attribute by namespace
prompt: Which Kubernetes namespace is generating the most log volume? Break down the top 3 namespaces by 24h volume. Be honest about labeling quality if it's a problem.
persona: Platform engineer tagging cost to teams. If labels are missing on most volume, that's the answer worth surfacing.

expected_answer.summary: On the demo env, (empty) is the top namespace by volume, with 5.40 GB / 24h. NOTE: 99.96% of volume has empty k8s_namespace label — a real labeling gap, not a single namespace dominating.
